message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T14:52 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

Deacon, checking in. I need to execute immediately - hook is already loaded with work.

The hook shows: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0ppawj` - mol-deacon-patrol

All children are marked as ✓ (completed):

- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ocg28v: Decide: loop or hand off
- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-tjhthl: Scan agent health


- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-yu5hwy: Check for orphaned processes

All steps are done, so I'm updating the heartbeat, checking mol status, then squashing and either creating a new patrol cycle or handing off.
